_comment: Documentation-only fields such as _comment and _param_help are ignored by the code.

_param_help.n_records: Number of key-value records generated before parallelization.
_param_help.n_partitions: Number of Spark partitions / reducer partitions used by the distributed build.
_param_help.tree_order: Local B+ tree order used inside each Spark partition.
_param_help.n_point_queries: Number of exact-key distributed point queries to benchmark.
_param_help.n_range_queries: Number of distributed key-range queries to benchmark.
_param_help.seed: Random seed for dataset generation and query sampling.
_param_help.key_max: Maximum possible generated key. Together with n_records, this controls key density.
_param_help.range_low_min: Smallest lower bound that can be generated for a range query.
_param_help.range_low_max: Largest lower bound that can be generated for a range query.
_param_help.range_max_width: Maximum width of a generated range query.
